requirements.summary: Add translations for Spanish, French, Portuguese, German, Turkish, Russian, Vietnamese, Korean, and Dutch to frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts alongside the existing English strings
acceptanceCriteria: translations.ts exports locale entries for: en, es, fr, pt, de, tr, ru, vi, ko, nl
All existing English translation keys are present in each new locale
Missing keys fall back to English as defined in TranslationContext

file_operations.description: Add nine new locale objects (es, fr, pt, de, tr, ru, vi, ko, nl) to the exported translations object, each containing all existing translation keys from the English locale with translated values. Preserve the existing 'en' locale unchanged. Ensure all nested sections (nav, auth, home, discover, profile, social, settings, etc.) are fully translated for each new language.

requirements.summary: Update frontend/src/contexts/TranslationContext.tsx to support all ten locales and ensure the translation function resolves strings correctly with English fallback
acceptanceCriteria: TranslationContext accepts and resolves all ten supported locale codes
Switching language updates all translated strings in the UI
Any missing key in a non-English locale falls back to the English value

file_operations.description: Update the TranslationContext to recognize and support all ten locale codes (en, es, fr, pt, de, tr, ru, vi, ko, nl). Ensure the translation function 't' resolves keys from the user's selected language and falls back to English when a key is missing in the selected locale. Verify that language switching triggers a re-render of all translated strings throughout the app.

requirements.summary: Update the language selector in frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx to list all ten supported languages and persist the selected language via the existing useAccountSettings language mutation
acceptanceCriteria: Settings page language dropdown lists all 10 languages with their native names
Selecting a language saves the preference and the entire UI re-renders in the chosen language

file_operations.description: Update the language selector dropdown in the Settings page to display all ten supported languages using their native names (e.g., 'English', 'Español', 'Français', 'Português', 'Deutsch', 'Türkçe', 'Русский', 'Tiếng Việt', '한국어', 'Nederlands'). Wire the dropdown to the existing setLanguage mutation from useAccountSettings to persist the user's choice. Ensure selecting a new language updates the TranslationContext and re-renders the entire UI in the chosen language. Keep English as the default.
